entries.message: This `Schema.Struct` includes a `_tag` field. `Schema.TaggedStruct` is the tagged-struct form for this pattern and makes the tag optional in the constructor.

This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`.
